service.description: Check configured SFTP locations for available files and run reconciliation through the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline or the temporary mapping bridge.

parameter.name: ruleSetId
parameter.description: Preferred RuleSet input for the SFTP automation cutover. When present, automation routing uses the RuleSet compare-scope pipeline.

parameter.name: compareScopeId
parameter.description: Optional compare-scope override. Required only when the RuleSet exposes more than one compare scope.

parameter.name: reconciliationMappingId
parameter.description: Legacy mapping bridge input retained temporarily for existing scheduled jobs that have not been migrated yet.

parameter.name: reconciliationRunId
parameter.description: Optional run identifier for logging/context only.

parameter.name: file1SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 1 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: file2SystemEnumId
parameter.description: Optional file 2 system identifier. In RuleSet mode this is used only for file-side validation; in mapping mode it remains required.

parameter.name: file1FileTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Optional override for file 1 type (DftCsv, DftJson).

parameter.name: file2FileTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Optional override for file 2 type (DftCsv, DftJson).

parameter.name: file1SchemaFileName
parameter.description: Optional override for file 1 JSON schema (required when JSON).

parameter.name: file2SchemaFileName
parameter.description: Optional override for file 2 JSON schema (required when JSON).

parameter.name: file1RemotePath
parameter.description: Remote path for file 1 (required if only referencing a server).

parameter.name: file2RemotePath
parameter.description: Remote path for file 2 (required if only referencing a server).

parameter.name: archiveSubdir
parameter.description: Folder name (under the remote/local directory) where consumed files will be moved.

parameter.name: stageLocation
parameter.description: Where staged copies of SFTP files will be written before reconciliation.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Override for reconciliation outputs. Defaults to a `reconciled` subfolder under the stage directory.
